data: Group Discussion - Lateral Hiring vs. Fresher Hiring
Group Discussion - Lateral Hiring vs. Fresher Hiring
Learn how to discuss lateral hiring and fresher hiring in a group discussion

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to discuss Lateral Hiring vs. Fresher Hiring in a group discussion.

Using the right structure helps you speak clearly and confidently.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to talk about what something offers or contributes, use this structure:

"[Topic] offers [advantage]."

For example: "Lateral hiring offers immediate expertise to the organization."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If someone asks about the benefits of fresher hiring, you can say:

"Fresher hiring offers new energy and fresh perspectives to the team."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Next!

message:
When you want to mention both the advantage and the drawback, use this structure:

"While [topic] offers [advantage], it also has a [drawback]."

For example: "While lateral hiring offers experience, it also has a higher cost of recruitment."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice discussing lateral hiring vs. fresher hiring!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about what lateral hiring offers

1.Lateral hiring offers immediate expertise to the organization.
2.Lateral hiring is always better than fresher hiring.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to talk about the drawback of fresher hiring

1.Fresher hiring is a bad idea because they have no skills.
2.While fresher hiring offers adaptability, it also has a longer training period.

Correct answer: 2
Lateral hiring offers specialized domain knowledge that is directly applicable.
While lateral hiring offers quick onboarding, it also has the challenge of blending into a new work culture.
Fresher hiring offers long-term commitment and loyalty to the organization.
While fresher hiring offers enthusiasm, it also has the challenge of limited work experience.
Lateral hiring offers a strong industry network to the company.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. What does lateral hiring offer to a company? Use Structure 1.'

'2. While lateral hiring offers experience, what challenge does it also bring? Respond using Structure 2.'

'3. What does fresher hiring offer to an organization? Use Structure 1.'

'4. While fresher hiring offers fresh ideas, what risk does it also bring? Give your answer using Structure 2.'

'5. What does lateral hiring offer to team performance? Use Structure 1.'"
